Emmanuele, thank you. So, how does Brazil compare to the rest of the region?
Good question, Marc. In my opinion, Brazil is the leader in Latin America, and this year it has the best performance.
Bigger than Mexico?
Yes, bigger than Mexico. But Mexico has a higher growth rate, so the gap between us is smaller than last year.
Interesting. And what is your most important priority right now?
Atopic dermatitis. It is our biggest opportunity, and the trend is very positive: the numbers are better than last quarter.
And your biggest challenge?
The public market. There is a significant gap there, but in my opinion it is also the best opportunity for next year.
Brazil is the biggest market in Latin America.
Mexico has a higher growth rate, but the gap is smaller than last year.
Atopic dermatitis is our most important priority.
In my opinion, this is the most significant trend.

Emmanuele, Marc Dubois. One message before the business review on Thursday. When you present Brazil, please do not give me a long list of numbers. Give me comparisons. I want to hear three things. First: how does Brazil compare to the region? Is it bigger or smaller than Mexico, and is the growth higher or lower? Second: what is your most important priority, and why is it the biggest opportunity? And third: where is the widest gap, the place with the most work to do? Remember, a number alone says nothing. The best review is the one with the clearest comparisons. See you Thursday.

Good morning, everyone. Claire Bennett here, with the quarterly comparison across the regions. First, the headline. Latin America has the highest growth of all the regions this quarter, and Brazil is the biggest market inside it. That is very good news. Now, the interesting part. The growth in Asia is a little lower, but the gap between the public and the private market is much smaller there, so the opportunity is different. My message is simple. Do not only look at the biggest number. Look at the trend. The region with the fastest growth this year is not the biggest one. It is one of the smallest. So when you send me your review, I do not want a long list. I want three comparisons and one clear priority. Thank you, everyone.

Good morning, Marc. Here is the comparison for Brazil. Brazil is the biggest market in Latin America, and this year it has the best performance. Mexico has a higher growth rate, but the gap is smaller than last year. Our most important priority is atopic dermatitis, the biggest opportunity. In my opinion, that is the most significant trend of the quarter.
